story_summary: Player just encountered the elusive Saori who gave them the glyph codex device with minimal instruction. They continue on their journey and arrive at the market. They encounter a couple who look at the player with suspicion

dialogue_sequence.speaker: Nima
dialogue_sequence.dialogue: We are not here to give strangers advice

dialogue_sequence.speaker: Player
dialogue_sequence.dialogue: I just well...yes I'm sorry if I'm intruding. I've traveled a long way, I just need to get my bearings
